parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title RqP - Request Resource

actor "Requesting Party\n(RqP)" as RqP

box "Client Application (CA)\n<<Custom Application>>" #LightGreen
participant "User Interface" as UI
end box

box "Resource Server (RS)\n<<Custom Application>>" #Bisque
participant "REST API" as RS_REST
database "Resource" as RS_Resource
database "Credential" as RS_Credential
end box

box "Authorization Server (AS)\nForgeRock Access Manager" #AntiqueWhite
participant "AM API" as AS_AM
participant "UMA API" as AS_UMA
participant "OAuth API" as AS_OAuth
end box

box "Content Server (CS)\n<<Custom Application>>" #PaleTurquoise
participant "REST API" as CS_REST
database "Data" as CS_Data
end box

RqP -> AS_AM : Authenticate
activate AS_AM
AS_AM --> RqP : Authenticated
deactivate AS_AM

RqP -> UI : Access Interface
activate UI

UI -> UI : Obtain Resource Id\n(maybe from Discover Resources)
UI -> RS_REST : GET /share/resources/{resourceId}\nscopes (no valid RPT)
activate RS_REST

RS_REST -> RS_Resource : Get _id
activate RS_Resource
RS_Resource --> RS_REST : meta data
deactivate RS_Resource

RS_REST -> AS_AM : Get PAT
activate AS_AM
AS_AM --> RS_REST : PAT
deactivate AS_AM

note left of RS_REST : Get permission ticket for the\nresource and scope
RS_REST -> AS_UMA : POST /am/uma/permission_request\nresource_id + scopes
activate AS_UMA
AS_UMA --> RS_REST : permission ticket
deactivate AS_UMA

RS_REST --> UI : permission ticket + AS URI
deactivate RS_REST

UI -> UI : Get client auth basic

note left of UI : Get claim token for the\nRequesting Party (RqP)
UI -> AS_OAuth : POST /am/oauth2/access_token\nscope=openid\nSSO session
activate AS_OAuth

AS_OAuth -> AS_OAuth : Validate SSO session
AS_OAuth --> UI : claim token
deactivate AS_OAuth

note left of UI : Get Requesting Party Token (RPT)\nusing the permission ticket\nand claim token
UI -> AS_OAuth : POST /am/oauth2/access_token\ngrant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:uma-ticket\nscope=..., ticket=..., claim_token=..., claim_token_format=...
activate AS_OAuth

AS_OAuth -> AS_AM : Check Access
activate AS_AM
AS_AM -> AS_AM : No Policy for RqP + Resource + scopes\nCreate Access Request for Resource Owner
AS_AM --> AS_OAuth : No Access, request Submitted
deactivate AS_AM

AS_OAuth --> UI : Error: Request Submitted
deactivate AS_OAuth

UI --> RqP
deactivate UI

@enduml
```
